title: Text Diffusion, Tiny
tagline: Mask, predict, reveal — how diffusion generates text without going left to right
summary: A hands-on explainer that trains a discrete denoising diffusion model on Indian names in your browser, showing how iterative unmasking generates text without predicting one token at a time.
highlights: See how autoregressive generation differs from diffusion-style parallel prediction with a concrete side-by-side example.
Slide a noise level and watch Indian names dissolve into masks and back.
Train a tiny neural network live in the browser — adjust epochs and learning rate, watch the loss curve drop.
Generate new names by iterative denoising, watching characters emerge step by step from pure noise.
